title: Fruitober
description: A resourcepack that paints the world in the colors of Autumn and adds Halloween CITs to the game.
body:
This is a Halloween/Autumn texture pack created by S33R_OF_PYR3 and Realio, with ideas and inspiration from Pippikrin and PoisonedOak.

This pack features an overall adjustment to grass, leaves, and flora to make it feel more like Fall as well as a multitude of custom item textures and models fit for the spooky season. Costumes items like various witch hats and brooms all the way to 8 different Halloween themed cakes have been created. Open the Notes folder and 'Everything Changed' text document inside the pack folder for a more detailed list on what the pack includes.

The CIT and sky retexture features require Optifine or a supplementary mod like CIT resewn or Custom Skyboxes to see these features in game.

This pack is functional in any version from 1.17 to 1.21

~ Seer
